Bug / Task Description: SWIM suspects are never promoted to dead: the elapsed suspicion duration is computed with the time operands reversed, yielding a negative duration that never exceeds the suspicion timeout, so failed members linger as suspect forever. Other failure-detector paths (suspect-on-nack, indirect-ack) work, so the bug only shows when the suspicion timeout should fire.
Commit Subject: fix(membership): measure suspicion age forward in time
